title: cordia globifera
intro: Cordia globifera, also known as the African cordia or globular cordia, is a plant species native to tropical regions, characterized by its unique shape and medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of the Cordia globifera plant are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. Cordia globifera is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies such as creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
